# Cross-language codec parity vectors -- GENERATED, do not hand-edit.
# Source of truth: host/vdi_tunnel/{protocol,fountain}.py, via
# host/tools/gen_parity_vectors.py. Asserted by host/tests/test_parity.py and
# bridge-plugin/src/test/kotlin/com/vditunnel/bridge/ParityTest.kt.
#
# One record per line:  NAME <args...> => <expected...>
# Byte strings are lowercase hex; '-' is the empty string.

# NEIGHBORS symbolId k dmax => sorted source indices, comma-separated
NEIGHBORS 10 10 8 => 1,5,6
NEIGHBORS 11 10 8 => 1,5,6,7
NEIGHBORS 25 10 8 => 0,1,3,6,8,9
NEIGHBORS 100 10 8 => 2,6,8,9
NEIGHBORS 7 5 8 => 0,4
NEIGHBORS 9 5 8 => 0,1,2,3,4
NEIGHBORS 50 7 8 => 0,1,3,4,5,6
NEIGHBORS 4 4 8 => 1,2,3
NEIGHBORS 8 4 8 => 0,2,3
NEIGHBORS 0 10 8 => 0
NEIGHBORS 9 10 8 => 9
NEIGHBORS 0 1 8 => 0
NEIGHBORS 5 1 8 => 0
NEIGHBORS 3 2 8 => 0,1
NEIGHBORS 10 10 2 => 5,6
NEIGHBORS 10 10 4 => 1,5,6
NEIGHBORS 10 3 8 => 0,1,2
NEIGHBORS 16777215 10 8 => 2,4,6,8
NEIGHBORS 65536 1000 8 => 62,95,312,432,522,595,639,818

# HEARTBEAT genId state rxHashHex bridgeVer schemaHashHex => framed bytes
HEARTBEAT 0 0 00000000 1 00000000 => 56440102000000000000000100000000f7c78946
HEARTBEAT 42 2 89abcdef 7 12345678 => 56440102002a0289abcdef07123456780405b0de
HEARTBEAT 65535 4 ffffffff 255 ffffffff => 56440102ffff04ffffffffffffffffffe247ee7d

# REQ genId seq total codec chunkHex => base64 line as typed into the textarea
REQ 1 0 1 1 7b226964223a317d => Q0QBAAEAAAABAXsiaWQiOjF98/8IQg==
REQ 65535 65534 65535 0 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f2021222324 => Q0QB/////v//AAABAgMEBQYHCAkKCwwNDg8QERITFBUWFxgZGhscHR4fICEiIyRZm2Rw
REQ 3 2 9 1 - => Q0QBAAMAAgAJAVOLt7o=

# ACK prevHex chunkHex => rolling CRC32 (zlib.crc32(chunk, prev))
ACK 00000000 - => 00000000
ACK 00000000 7b226964223a317d => 445df8c5
ACK 2144df1c 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f2021222324 => c87e1027
ACK ffffffff 0000000000000000 => ffffffff

# SHATAIL payloadHex => low 4 bytes of SHA-256, big-endian
SHATAIL - => e3b0c442
SHATAIL 7b226a736f6e727063223a22322e30222c226964223a312c22726573756c74223a7b226f6b223a747275657d7d => 3cb98209
SHATAIL 000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f2021222324 => f4d285f4
SHATAIL  => 70d3bf8b

# ZLIB rawHex => codec compressedHex  (deflate output need not be
# byte-identical across languages -- the codec CHOICE must match, and each
# side must inflate the other's bytes back to raw.)
ZLIB 7b226a736f6e727063223a22322e30222c226964223a312c22726573756c74223a7b226f6b223a747275657d7d => 0 7b226a736f6e727063223a22322e30222c226964223a312c22726573756c74223a7b226f6b223a747275657d7d
